title: Contra (Arcade, 1987) — Stage 1 jungle side-scroll
source: archive.org item 'Contraarcade1cc' (Contra Arcade 1cc longplay), file contra1cc.mp4 (480x360, ~29.97fps, 539s). Frame-grabbed with ffmpeg.
role: NOSTALGIC-FEEL CADENCE ANCHOR (dim-3). Clean side-scroll gameplay for movement-cadence grounding — unlike the Steam competitor TRAILERS which are boss/title montages (no clean isolated jump).
scope: Grounds the ARCADE cadence/feel reference: brisk run-right pacing, 8-way diagonal aim (visible bullet streams), fixed-arc somersault jumps over ledges/water. Precise apex/airtime pixel-measurement is bounded by the small hero (~playfield 256x224) — see teardowns/cadence-dim3.md for OUR measured cadence + the exact frame-step repro to pin arcade apex/airtime.

frames.shows: Stage-1 open jungle: mountains bg, bridge over water, run-right pacing
bamboo forest run, dense enemy trickle
native-fps crop: hero firing diagonal (8-way aim), grassy ledges
